name: Karan KC
profileSummary: Karan Khatri Chhetri, known as Karan KC, is a Nepalese professional cricketer. He played in Nepal's first ever One Day International (ODI) match, against the Netherlands in August 2018. Karan is a right-handed batsman and a right-arm fast-medium bowler. He made his debut against Uganda in January 2015. KC became the second cricketer of Nepal to take his 100th wicket in T20Is. He was the Nepali first player to claim five wickets in a T20I for Nepal against PNG.
